full_text:
Zhu Yue
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zhu Yuewas born in Dong. Plotted against Cao Cao. What happened to him or his conspiracy is unknown. Zhu Yue was affiliated with the Han Dynasty.
